beans.name: Yirgacheffe Konga
beans.description: A bright, jasmine-forward cup with stone-fruit acidity and a clean, tea-like finish. The classic Yirgacheffe profile, drawn out with a slow, gentle pour.

pours.label: Bloom
pours.notes: Pour in tight spirals, then swirl the dripper. Wait 40s — you should smell bergamot lift off.

pours.label: Pour 1
pours.notes: Slow center pour, build the bed evenly. This is where the florals open up.

pours.label: Pour 2
pours.notes: Steady spiral to the edge. Drawdown should finish around 2:45 with a flat bed.

beans.name: Huila La Esperanza
beans.description: Round and syrupy with red apple, brown sugar, and cocoa nib. A reliable everyday pour-over that rewards a slightly cooler, more patient brew.

pours.label: Bloom
pours.notes: Saturate fully and swirl. Rest 45s — degassing builds the syrupy body.

pours.label: Pour 1
pours.notes: Center pour, gentle pulses. Keep the slurry on the higher side of the dripper.

pours.label: Pour 2
pours.notes: Slow spiral, then a tiny swirl at the end to flatten the bed. Drawdown ~3:15.

beans.name: Nyeri AA Gichathaini
beans.description: Punchy blackcurrant, tomato vine, and grapefruit. High-toned acidity with a juicy, almost wine-like body. Demands clean, hot water and a confident pour.

pours.label: Bloom
pours.notes: Big bloom with a hard swirl. Rest 35s — you want the CO₂ out before the first pour.

pours.label: Pour 1
pours.notes: Confident center pour to wake up the acidity. Don't baby it.

pours.label: Pour 2
pours.notes: Spiral out, finish with a swirl. Aim for a 3:00 drawdown — past 3:30 it goes flat.

beans.name: Antigua Finca El Pulcal
beans.description: Dark chocolate, toasted almond, and dried cherry. Velvety body with a long, cocoa-dusted finish. The cup that proves medium roast still belongs on the V60.

pours.label: Bloom
pours.notes: Gentle saturation, swirl once. Rest 45s — medium roasts need the time.

pours.label: Pour 1
pours.notes: Slow, low pour from the center. Keep agitation minimal to protect the body.

pours.label: Pour 2
pours.notes: Wide spiral, no swirl at the end. Drawdown should land around 3:30.
